scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && rm -rf ./public && cp -R artifacts/devtraco-plus/dist/public ./public
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/devtraco-plus" --if-present run typecheck
